title: Museum Curator
description: Museum Curator provides a checklist to assist with collecting every item in Minecraft
body:
*"That belongs in a museum!"* - Indiana Jones
 

Museum Curator is a mod intending to assist with the lofty goal of collecting every item in Minecraft. To do this it provides a Museum Checklist that can be crafted by placing paper above a wooden slab. This checklist can be used to open up a categorised list of every survival-obtainable item in Minecraft, which can then be checked off as they are collected. Additionally, by using the checklist while crouched on a block that block will be checked off - if the block is a container, armor stand, item frame or flower pot the contents will also be checked off.
 

Checklist state is global and shared across all players.
 

Known limitations:

 - crouch-clicking on an item frame will add the frame's content but not the frame itself.

 - the item list only includes the general form of potions and enchanted books - not every possible variation since those are technically not different items in Minecraft.
